chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-20 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on o/objection 2.For hearing of main case 20-02-2025 M/s Ziaul Haque Kamboh and Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocates along with applicant. Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate along with respondent No.5. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Today, respondent No.5 Muhammad Anamullah is present along with minor baby Kinza, aged about six months, who is suckling baby; therefore; her temporary custody is being handed over to the applicant/mother; however, both the parties shall be at liberty to approach the proper forum under G&W Act for resolution of permanent custody of the said minor. The respondent No.5 being father has a right to meet his kid fortnightly at the residence of applicant at village Bazeedpur, Taluka Kandiaro district Naushahro Feroze, where she resides with her parents. Whenever, applicant feels uncomfortable with regard to custody of minor she may approach the SSP, Naushahro Feroze. The SSP, Naushahro Feroze is under legal obligation to provide protection to the applicant lady and her kid. With these observations, instant Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of. JUDGE Ahmad
